title: Unlisted's Enhanced MC
description: This modpack does a multitude of things, It enhances world terrain generation, Combat, Performance, and more. It adds many utility and QoL mods and also adds a new skill system.
body: This modpack boosts performance and enhances terrain generation on the earth and nether. It adds many utility and QoL mods like JEI, Xaeros Minimap and Worldmap, Camera utils, and more. It also has mods that enhance visuality such as Explosive enhancement, Continuity, and Iris shaders. It can go into space with Ad Astra. This mod pack also adds new mobs, with Creeper overhaul and naturalist. It also Has many new variations of structures. Download Today.
